notes:
The game loads, but I couldn't "agree" with the policy (choosing the agree option would make the confirmation sound but nothing would happen, I was obliged to chose the "back" option and leave the game).
I tried to load the game on windows to pass this step. It worked, but the title screen offers me no option (controller buttons give no audible feedback either), so all I'm left with is alt+F4

I tried using proton 4.11, but had the same results.
title: Bladed Fury

notes: The works with perfect graphics, sound and controls. Already played for 4 hours and there's no problems at all, just pick up and play !
